title: Where did the Fullscreen option for PDF views go?
excerpt:

posts.author: OliverLink (Oliver Link)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, since we often use uploaded PDF files (such as catalogs, price lists etc.), I really loved the possibility to view the PDF files in full screen aka Presentation mode.

With an update some time ago, this option is gone… or am I just blind and can’t see it?
How can I view files, especially PDFs in fullscreen (with pageturn functionalities, as it was there before?

Thanks very much for help!
best regards
Oliver

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Oliver! Sorry for the late reply here!

If you’re on an Enterprise level account, this can be due to the HIPAA compliant features on the account. If you’re not but you’re still having these issues with the file preview, let us know at support@monday.com and we’ll get this resolved together!
